prompt:
A stunning watercolor painting of Cristiano Ronaldo sitting at an outdoor cafe table in a sunny European city street during golden hour, warm vibrant lighting. He is wearing a light blue patterned button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, white pants, a black luxury watch, and a diamond stud earring. Silver over-ear headphones rest around his neck. He is holding his aviator sunglasses with his right hand, slightly lifting them while looking confidently to the side. 

On the marble table in front of him is a tall glass of iced coffee with a straw and a small potted flower. The background features beautiful European architecture, a tall historic building with a spire, trees with golden autumn leaves, street lamps, cafe awnings, and blurred pedestrians. A framed picture of Ronaldo playing football hangs on the stone wall to the left. 

Artistic watercolor style with visible brush strokes, vibrant colors, warm golden sunlight, cinematic composition, highly detailed, elegant and sophisticated atmosphere.
